summary: Reviews flag an incorrect date and request deletion; no musical or technical feedback is provided.
review: Both reviewers note that the submission appears to have the wrong concert date (likely September 28‑1972) and ask for it to be removed, mentioning a corrected upload elsewhere. There are no comments on sound quality, performance, or band members, so the recording’s artistic merit remains undocumented.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two brief reviews focused solely on metadata errors; no substantive evaluation of show or recording quality can be made.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about soundboard, audience mix, clarity, or other technical aspects.
